tools.name: device.detectDevice

tools.description: Get expired digital certificates embedded in a device firmware

tools.description: Get private crypto keys embedded in a device firmware

tools.description: Get iot device firmware risk analysis

tools.name: firmware.getWeakKeys
tools.description: Get weak crypto keys with short length

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
